character1.name: Mighty the Brave Warrior
character1.description: A strong young warrior who embarks on a quest to find a sacred sword to protect his kingdom

character2.name: Finn the Forest Shadow Archer
character2.description: A silent archer with legendary accuracy who protects the forest from danger

character3.name: Damien the Dark Knight
character3.description: A mysterious knight cursed by an evil witch, forced to journey to discover the truth about his past

character4.name: Laia the Light Mage
character4.description: A young light sorceress who uses magic to heal people and dispel darkness

character1.name: DJ Don the Aspiring DJ
character1.description: Loves listening to music and can groove to any beat! Dreams of one day playing music for the whole world to dance to!

character2.name: Captain Bo the Future Sailor
character2.description: Obsessed with the sea! Loves reading maps, learning about ships, and dreams of becoming a great captain someday

character3.name: Bear Yu the Kid Who Wants to Be a Bear
character3.description: Loves bears more than anything! Has every bear costume, collects bear-themed items, and believes that with enough faith, one day he'll become a real bear!

character4.name: Good Girl the Promising Child
character4.description: Used to be lazy about studying, but now tries her best! Dreams of graduating and making her parents proud

character1.name: Ash the Mysterious Hacker
character1.description: A technology genius who can hack any system in an instant, but still has a gentle heart

character2.name: Neon the Racer Under the Lights
character2.description: Faster than light, uncatchable, ready to challenge every path in the city of the future

character3.name: Six the Mechanical Fighter
character3.description: Strong as a machine, there's no mission Six can fail!

character4.name: Luna the Cyber Soldier
character4.description: Silent as the night, sharp as a futuristic blade, no target escapes her sight

character1.name: Tori the Young Adventurer
character1.description: A heart full of dreams, eager to explore the wide world

character2.name: Ray the Genius Thinker
character2.description: Loves reading books and always coming up with new ideas

character3.name: Min the Cheerful Child
character3.description: The smallest in the group, but runs fast and is curious about everything!

character4.name: Big the Gentle Giant
character4.description: Though he looks strong and tough, he's actually the gentlest one

character1.name: Teddy the Playful Bear
character1.description: Loves hugs more than anything! Always asks for a hug when meeting someone

character2.name: Bunny the Mischievous Rabbit
character2.description: Hops around everywhere, never stays still, and is great at stealing carrots

character3.name: Mew Mew the Clever Cat
character3.description: Leader of the cute team, just one look and treats are easily earned

character4.name: Snow the Soft White Cat
character4.description: Fluffy like a snowball, anyone who hugs him falls in love

Peacock.name: Pui-Pui
Peacock.description: Soft, fluffy feathers that sparkle. Loves to dance and show off his tail to friends. Gets so shy when complimented that he dances with joy!

Malayan_A.name: Tup-Tap
Malayan_A.description: Walks with a gentle patter, curious by nature but kind-hearted. When he sees water, he quickly jumps in for a refreshing soak

Elk_A.name: Jee-Jee
Elk_A.description: Runs as fast as the wind but is extremely shy. If you want Jee-Jee to come close, you need to use his favorite fresh leaves

Bison.name: Khon-Fu
Bison.description: The softest, fluffiest fur perfect for hugging! Khon-Fu is big-hearted and gentle, wanting his fur petted every single day

Mole.name: Peb-Ble
Mole.description: A professional digger who always hides toys in burrows. If you want to see Peb-Ble pop up, you need to bring some treats as bait

Pangolin_A.name: Num-Nim
Pangolin_A.description: Round and incredibly soft to touch! When startled, he rolls into a ball that's perfect for cuddling

Iguana_A.name: Mee-Mee
Iguana_A.description: Loves plants with all his heart. You'll always find Mee-Mee hiding among the bushes

Iguana_B.name: Moo-Moo
Iguana_B.description: Extremely affectionate and loves warm sunbaths. If you gently pet his head, he'll close his eyes in bliss

Anteater_B.name: Tid-Tee
Anteater_B.description: Long, long tongue! Eats ants lightning-fast. Shy at first, but once he trusts you, he loves to gently nuzzle with his head

Anteater_A.name: Tom-Tam
Anteater_A.description: A true explorer! Loves to sniff around and search for food. When he finds lots of ants, he gets so happy he dances with joy

Chipmunk_A.name: Suk-Son
Chipmunk_A.description: Playful and runs around all day, no one can catch up! If he disappears, try looking up in the trees - he might be hiding there

Possum_A.name: Puk-Luk
Possum_A.description: When scared, he pretends to faint, but he's just acting! He also loves to hang upside down and sleep for fun

Otter_A.name: Ot-to
Otter_A.description: The best swimmer ever! When sleeping, he likes to hold hands with friends so they don't float away. The ultimate cuddle buddy of the water

Redpanda_A.name: Pan-Pan
Redpanda_A.description: Playful, affectionate, and loves treats so much! If you have apples for him, he'll follow you around adorably

Sloth_A.name: Tuam-Tiam
Sloth_A.description: Moves slowly but has the biggest heart! Tuam-Tiam loves hugs and always needs to find someone to cuddle with when he wakes up

Armadillo_A.name: Shel-Ly
Armadillo_A.description: The softest, fluffiest fur perfect for hugging! Big-hearted and gentle, wanting his fur petted every single day

Armadillo_B.name: Lhun-Lhun
Armadillo_B.description: The softest, fluffiest fur perfect for hugging! Big-hearted and gentle, wanting his fur petted every single day
